div.p: Syscall Latency Measurement via Hash Map State Bridge
Type: BPF_MAP_TYPE_HASH Max Entries: 10,240 Key: u32 (Thread ID) Value: u64 (start timestamp) CRITICAL: Key by TID not PID! Multi-threaded processes share PID but have unique TIDs.

g.text: 1. Each thread gets unique hash map entry
2. Entry created on syscall ENTRY only
3. Entry MUST be deleted on EXIT (prevent leak)
❌ Keying by PID instead of TID
❌ Not checking lookup result for NULL
